response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience but does not meet the core requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. C++ exposure appears limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis project. There is also no demonstrated experience building large-scale cloud compute platforms, distributed systems at the scale implied, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than C++ infrastructure.
strengths: Broad polyglot background across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/s)
Strong community and mentoring footprint via workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of direct C++ work at NI
No evidence of leading or architecting large-scale internal cloud compute platforms
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform architecture experience
High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic
